title: PWMod
description: A mod about Russian Minecraft streamer - PWGood. Adds items related to him
body:
# Requirements

From version 1.1 (and higher) requires "[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)" to work

## Who is PWGood?

#### PWGood - is a Russian Twitch streamer and Youtuber. Often he plays Minecraft and also has his server - PepeLand (Pepe the frog meme). PWGood also member of private Minecraft server - Mineshield. He likes tophats, yellow color, cats, frogs and dispensers, funny and Good man.

## Why I created that?

𝓘 𝓶𝓪𝓭𝓮 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓼 𝓬𝓪𝓾𝓼𝓮 𝓷𝓸 𝓸𝓷𝓮 𝓮𝓵𝓼𝓮 𝓭𝓲𝓭
##### _...and that my first try in mod making_
## What mod adds?

Items, armor set, accessories, and other thing **(Information provided from last version)**

![Title of 1.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e1f9507c2f02e5ca8d27cb0c1f92571ef4b413e.png)

- "Denegi" - (or money in Russian) One of the materials from which everything in mod is made. This joke refers to PWGood's capitalist set, he loves money. In game you can craft Denegi with Gold ingot, 2 Papers and Yellow dye (you get 2 Denegs per craft)
 
- "Luxurious fabric" - Golden-black fabric another material from which most of things in mod is made. If you rotate texture of item you can see tophat in it. In game you can craft this Fabric with 2 Black dyes, 2 Leather and 3 Denegs (you get 3 Luxurious fabrics per craft)

- "Outfit" - Mod adds PWGood clothes from his Minecraft skin in game: Tophat, Suit, Trousers and Boots. Armor is slightly better than golden, almost like iron and has high knockback reduction (also sneakers shine when running), also it has 3D model

- "Walking stick" - Very "capitalistic". Black-yellow luxurious stick gives effect Speed II **only while you running** and **when it in your main (or second) hand**. Also it hurts slightly more than nothing and applies Slowness and Mining fatigue on enemies. In game you can craft Stick with 2 Sticks, 2 Denegs and 3 Luxurious fabrics

- "Stop sigh" - PWGood loves road signs, genius way to write about a message, a warning or a danger that goes beyond the sign. The "Stop" is his most favourite sigh among all the signs, red octagon in white frame. In game sign is sort of a weapon.When you hold it in hand, you get "Slowness I" effect. When you hit an entity with a sign, it gets "Slowness II" effect for two seconds. Craft is not so easy, for first - craft Golden Pattern, a one of materials of mod, craft it with Paper and Denegi, them you will know what to do next...
- #### "Accessories" - I tell you that it requires Curios API (from 1.1+ version, 1.0 don't requre that API). I added two new accessories what refers to PWGood:
- "Pepeland band" - PWGood Minecraft skin has that band on left hand, so i added it in mod. It just gives Jump boost II when player wearing in (don't has wearing model) and gives Dolphin grace in water (also it sounds like a frog :D). In game you can craft Band with 7 Denegs and Bucket of Tadpole (Bucket don't save after craft)


<details>
<summary>That thing there just for fun</summary>

- "Golden panties" - Somebody asked me for adding that... so i do. This joke also refers to "Don't wear pants" joke and this just fun. While you wearing Golden panties, you get Resistance II effect... and also you explode when burning or in lava

</details>

## Why i should download that

If you like PWGood, you can play this mod. ~~I hope maybe he will check that mod on stream :)~~

**He did it** (Russian only)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Dtm_mH9VfCk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Development

You can watch the development of this mod (and others my mods) in my [Telegram channel](https://t.me/pipochaterdevlog) (Rus only)
